prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to a charity registered in England and addresses governance issues under the Charities Act 2011, which is specific to England and Wales. It does not apply to Scotland, which has its own charity regulatory framework under the Office of the Scottish Charity Regulator (OSCR).
